rows.headline: Micron, Braiin, Redwire, Modine Manufacturing And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Tuesday
rows.summary: U.S. stocks were higher, Nasdaq up 350 points. Micron stock rose on UBS's tripled price target. Other big gainers include BRAI, RDW, HTT, ATOM, TE, MOD, ORBS, YSS, ASTS, UMC, and JOYY.

rows.headline: Coinbase's Eight-Figure Donations Ahead Of 'Most Consequential' Midterm Election
rows.summary: Coinbase and CEO Brian Armstrong are helping build an $85 million pro-crypto political war chest through the Fairshake super PAC ahead of what the exchange calls a critical U.S. election for digital asset regulation.

rows.headline: Polymarket Founder Says Insider Trading Fears Are 'Outlandish And Baseless'

rows.headline: Elon Musk Teases A Space‑Energy Boom — Rocket Lab's Little-Known Solar Arm Is Ready For It

rows.summary: Intel gains momentum with White House backing & potential foundry deals with Apple, Nvidia, and SpaceX. INTC stock rises.

rows.headline: What Is Going On With AMD Stock On Tuesday?
rows.summary: AMD stock surges 3% premarket to $481.81 as NVIDIA outlines an historic $200B CPU market opportunity. See why Evercore ISI raised its AMD price target to a bullish $579 ahead of an explosive summer earnings liftoff in 2026.

rows.headline: Nvidia's Jensen Huang Says AI Has Crossed A Critical Threshold: 'Tokens Are Now Profitable'
rows.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says tokens, units of AI-generated text, "are now profitable," offering a new lens on the AI spending boom.
